programs.title: Tamil News
programs.desc: News via satellite from PolimerTV Chennai India, in Tamil, no subtitles.

programs.title: Malayalam News
programs.desc: News via file delivery from Asianet News Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum), Kerala India, in Malayalam, no subtitles.

programs.title: Turkish News
programs.desc: Turkish language news from the Turkish Radio & Television Corporation (TRT) in Istanbul Turkiye, no subtitles.

programs.title: NHK Japanese News
programs.desc: News via satellite from NHK Tokyo in Japanese, no subtitles.

programs.title: Telugu News DD Yadagiri
programs.desc: News via satellite from DD Yadagiri, Hyderabad, Telangana, in Telugu, No subtitles. Broadcasting every night at 11:35pm on SBS WorldWatch Channel 35, also available daily on SBS OnDemand.

programs.title: Indonesian News
programs.desc: News via satellite from TVRI Jakarta Indonesia, in Indonesian, no subtitles.
